title: GlitchedDev´s Superflat Expansion
description: Easier superflat survival without structures. If you want to progress any further then the iron age, you have to have the create mod installed.
body:
_Credits:_ MCreator and The Create mod

**WARNING**: If the player wants to progress further then the iron age he/she needs to use the Create Mod also im sorry to everyone but the namespaces are called super fucking flat becuse I didnt use GlitchedDev´s Superflat Expansion as the name of the mod and I cant change the namespaces

Yo everyone, I wanted a fun and grindy supeflat no structures modded survival so I searched and searched but there were none that worked or I liked them so I have decided to make it myself. The mod adds many new things that help with survival on supeflat and let you progress faster then vanilla superflat survival.

Tutorial: _use jei for searching the recipes_
1. Craft a sieve.
  _1. You can right click grass blocks, dirt and gravel. Grass blocks give you sticks, grass and seeds. Dirt gives you pebbles and sticks. Gravel gives you redstone and a mineral mesh._
2. You can craft two planks with four sticks.
3. Get a tree by crafting leaves with 9 grass and you can optionaly get shears with two sharp rocks and a rock, you can get sharp rocks with two rocks and a pebble.
4. You can craft a rock with nine pebbles and with nine rocks you can craft gravel.
5. Craft a compressor and right click the gravel to get cobblestone with which you should craft a furnace and try rigt clicking the cobblestone and others after it to learn the pattern.
6. Get a stone cutter with two slime blocks, three stone blocks, one redstone block and a sharp rock
7. Cut the mineral mesh with the stone cutter to get a gold mineral mesh, a iron mineral mesh or a copper mineral mesh by smelting them in a furnace you get nuggets of the specific material
8. Get a crusher, a hyper heater and heavy leaves, by right clicking a stone blocks with a hyper heater you get lava and by right clicking heavy leaves with a crusher you get water, with all this make a cobblestone generator.
9. From now on use The Create Mod for diamonds and other materials
